reviews.author: Nishu1110
reviews.body:
Why the delete option for messages is not working, why am i not allowed to remove the unwanted messages from my chat??
How am i supposed to use an Indian app if it’s not even giving me the option to remove clutter from my chats??

reviews.author: Sonali Mukhi
reviews.body: After lots of review I installed it and really after using I felt I take good decision to switch WhatsApp to Arattai Messenger. It’s our Indian app and its features better from WhatsApp. I believe that any of you once use this messenger you will loved it. 👍 Go for it

reviews.author: ShrikanthAcharBala
reviews.body: MacOS version needs upgrade as there are some messages not getting displayed and is not in sync with the IOS version. Kindly release a upgrade for the MacOS version as it has been a long time and not in sync with the functionality of IOS version

reviews.author: Saacchhiin
reviews.body: Haaaaaaaa

reviews.author: Vixal Sahu
reviews.body:
Hi Team,

I’ve been using this app personally and I really like it. I’ve even shared it with all my friends and added people to it.

I noticed a few small issues that I’d like to mention:
	1.	The video quality feels a bit poor.
	2.	My iPhone starts heating up after using video calls for some time.
	3.	Please consider adding a screen-sharing option during video calls.

Thanks.

reviews.author: Pranjal Chaudhary_07
reviews.body: there’s some glitch sometimes that messages just wont send so I have to close app and clear and reopen and then cancel the pending messages and then resend them then only messages are sent and this happens like once in an hour . Secondly I can’t see if a person is typing like there’s no typing indicator in Ios currently but there’s in Android which I check . Other then this I would like to have a accessibility of exporting chats . Otherwise overall experience is Good .

recent_posts.body:
Share once. Reach many. 
Send updates to multiple people at once, without compromising on security. With end-to-end encryption, your broadcast messages stay between you and your recipients only.

#Broadcast #StayConnected #Arattai

comments.author: खुरपेंची स्वास्थ्य
comments.body:
FSSAI 140 करोड़ लोगों की ज़िंदगी से खेल रहा है।

देश के सबसे निकम्मे और भ्रष्ट विभागों में से एक बन चुका है।

न सही checks,
न proper inspections,
बस ऐसे certificates बंट रहे हैं जैसे किराने का सामान हो।

देश का खाना हर दिन और ज़हरीला होता जा रहा है।

comments.author: Ankit Kumar Avasthi
comments.body:
ऑन सीरियस नोट,

गैस सिलेंडर की कमी से परेशानी तो हो रही है, लेकिन सबसे ज्यादा असर प्रवासी श्रमिकों और घर से बाहर लॉज, पीजी या कमरा लेकर पढ़ाई कर रहे छात्रों पर हो रहा है। जिनका अपना कनेक्शन है, उनका तो काम चल रहा है। यहां तक कि जिनका जुगाड़ चल रहा है, वे एक-दो सिलेंडर ज्यादा ही

recent_posts.body:
Chat Backup is now available on Arattai!

You can securely back up your end-to-end encrypted chats to Google Drive (Android) or iCloud (iOS), and restore them when needed. 

Update to the latest version of Arattai and enable now.

recent_posts.body:
Arattai services are currently experiencing downtime due to infrastructure issues at our data center. Our technical team is actively investigating and working to restore normal operations at the earliest.

We appreciate your patience and understanding.

comments.author: Vivek Rana
comments.body: Thanks for the update. Appreciate the transparency. Hope the issue gets resolved soon and services are restored quickly. Looking forward to Arattai being back up and running smoothly.

comments.author: Skilleater...!!!

 Let Arattai help in delivering critical sms/ otp as secondary layer. Adoption via familiarity is key for success. Something which Windows did with it's relaxed stance on pirated versions in the 2000s.
